title: Laura Ashley 28cm Non Stick Frying Pan - Stylish BPA, PFOA-Free Forged Aluminium Frying Pan for Induction Hob - Easy to Wash & Oven Safe - Multi-Hob Compatible - 10 Years Guarantee - Dark Slate
features: Classic Laura Ashley Design: Elevate your kitchen with the 28cm frying pans nonstick from the iconic Laura Ashley collection, blending timeless style with practical functionality for a sophisticated cooking experience

Premium Non-Stick Performance: Enjoy effortless cooking with the 3-layer, PFOA-free non-stick coating that ensures even heat distribution and eliminates hot spots. The non stick pan provide perfect results every time, with minimal oil

Spacious 28cm Size for Versatile Cooking: The 28cm diameter and 4.2cm depth provide ample space for frying, searing, and sautéing larger portions, making it perfect for cooking a variety of ingredients with ease and versatility

Versatile & Easy Cleanup: Compatible with all hob types, including induction, and oven-safe up to 240°C. Plus, its non-stick surface makes cleanup a breeze, just wipe clean or pop the induction pan in the dishwasher
Durable Material: Built to last with a premium forged aluminium body, this frying pan ensures even heat distribution, preventing hot spots for reliable, consistent cooking results
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Multi Hob Compatible 2 Easy to Clean 3 Oven Safe Durable Non-Stick Coating The 3-layer PFOA-free non-stick surface ensures effortless food release, even heat distribution, and healthier cooking with minimal oil every time Ergonomic Handle for Comfort Enjoy safe and comfortable cooking with a heat-resistant stainless steel handle that provides a secure grip and stays cool on the hob Even Heat Distribution Forged aluminium base ensures consistent heat without hot spots, delivering perfectly cooked meals with ease Stylish & Sturdy Construction Designed with premium materials, this frying pan offers lasting durability for all your everyday cooking needs Laura Ashley Signature Cookware Range Frying Pan Add To Basket Milk Pan Buying Options Sauce Pan Add To Basket Wok Add To Basket Casserole Pot Buying Options Sauté pan Buying Options Customer Reviews 5.0 out of 5 stars 3 3.5 out of 5 stars 2 5.0 out of 5 stars 3 5.0 out of 5 stars 1 3.8 out of 5 stars 4 4.0 out of 5 stars 1 Price £19.99 £ 19 . 99 — £26.39 £ 26 . 39 £31.99 £ 31 . 99 — — Non Stick ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Lid ✘ ✘ ✔ ✘ ✔ ✔ Dishwasher Safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Oven Safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Multi Hob Compatible ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔
